title: hieracium glaucinum subsp. heteroschistum
intro: Hieracium glaucinum subsp. heteroschistum, also known as Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Hieracium glaucinum subsp. heteroschistum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its effectiveness and safety should be verified by a medical professional.
